code: import axios from'axios';export class RoomApi{constructor(){let baseURL=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:'http://localhost:8080/api';this.client=void 0;this.client=axios.create({baseURL,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});}async createRoom(name){const response=await this.client.post('/rooms',{name});return response.data;}async getRooms(){const response=await this.client.get('/rooms');return response.data;}async getRoom(roomId){const response=await this.client.get("/rooms/".concat(roomId));return response.data;}async deleteRoom(roomId){await this.client.delete("/rooms/".concat(roomId));}async getParticipants(roomId){const response=await this.client.get("/rooms/".concat(roomId,"/participants"));return response.data;}}export const roomApi=new RoomApi();
